projectDescription: A free, browser-based tool that lets anyone generate personalized, cinematic title sequences styled after the iconic glowing red typography and retro aesthetics of Stranger Things.
keyFeatures: Transforms custom text into Stranger Things-style animated title sequences with iconic glowing red typography
Fully in-browser rendering — no server-side video processing required
No account or sign-up needed — free to use instantly
Shareable links — generate a unique URL for every custom intro
80s-inspired cinematic transitions and dramatic visual effects
publicApiSurface: Shareable intro URL (query-string encoded text parameters)
Clone & run locally with Node.js v14+
